blocker: Human relabeling unavailable (no annotators/budget) so human-vs-human and human-vs-machine kappa cannot be computed; protocol + tested IAA library + primed blinded worksheet + machine-vs-machine baseline delivered, drop-in when labels arrive
one_line: Built tested zero-dep IAA library (Cohen/Fleiss/Krippendorff), generated a 126-episode human relabeling worksheet from 42 real scenarios + the real judge, and computed the machine-vs-machine baseline (judge-vs-judge kappa=1.0 idempotence; judge-vs-second-grader kappa=0.917)
